sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_string_split (id INTEGER, string_value STRING);
SELECT split_part(string_value, ';', 2) AS second_part FROM test_string_split WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_string_split SET string_value = 'red;green;blue' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT split_part(string_value, ';', 3) AS third_part FROM test_string_split WHERE id = 1;
